task: Add failing Playwright and validator coverage for achievement-gated manual learning

commands.summary: Validator accepted current data after manualReviewAfterPromotion invariants; output recorded in task-1-supporting-validator.txt.

commands.command: npx playwright test tests/ui/achievements-progress-coupling.spec.ts --grep "manual textbook achievement requires explicit completion"
commands.failingTest: Achievement progress coupling › manual textbook achievement requires explicit completion
commands.failureReason: Representative manual achievement action exists but does not carry data-learning-segment-id; the test has not yet reached the planned progress row / 完成学习 button assertions.

commands.command: npx playwright test tests/ui/achievements-progress-coupling.spec.ts --grep "every achievement card has an operable action"
commands.summary: All rendered achievement cards currently have exactly one button action with a target and label.

notes: Current production behavior is partially implemented from prior work, so the broad card action grep passed rather than failing.
Manual completion grep remains red for a valid product gap: action payload lacks the stable segment id required to route to a specific manual learning row.
